text: Hello and welcome to Real Easy English, the podcast where we have real conversations in easy English to help you learn.
zh: 你好，欢迎收听《Real Easy English》，在这档播客里我们用简单的英语进行真实的对话，帮助你学习英语。

text: I'm Georgie.
zh: 我是Georgie。

text: And I'm Neil.
zh: 我是Neil。

text: To watch a video version of this podcast and download a free worksheet, go to our website bbclearningenglish .com.
zh: 想看这期播客的视频版并下载免费练习表，请访问我们的网站bbclearningenglish.com。

text: Hi Neil, how are you?
zh: 嗨，Neil，你好吗？

text: Are you happy to be at work today?
zh: 你今天开心来上班吗？

text: Of course, I'm always happy to be at work.
zh: 当然，我一直都很开心来上班。

text: Great.
zh: 太好了。

text: Well, today we are talking about dream jobs.
zh: 好的，今天我们要聊聊梦想中的工作。

text: Obviously, this job is amazing, but we're going to talk about some different jobs we'd like to do.
zh: 显然我们现在的工作很棒，但我们要聊聊我们想做的一些其他工作。

text: Sounds good.
zh: 听起来不错。

text: Shall we start?
zh: 我们开始吧？

text: Yes.
zh: 好的。

text: So, Georgie, when you were a child, what did you want to do when you grew up?
zh: Georgie，你小时候长大后想做什么？

text: What was your dream job?
zh: 你的梦想职业是什么？

text: Well, when I was really little, about five or six,
zh: 嗯，我很小的时候，大概五六岁，

text: I remember telling people that I wanted to be a princess when i realized that wasn't going to be possible
zh: 我记得我跟人说过我想当公主，后来我意识到那不可能实现，

text: for me um my next dream was to be a pop star because my friends and i used to write songs um and perform in front of our parents and i thought
zh: 之后我的下一个梦想是当流行歌手，因为我和朋友们那时会写歌，然后在父母面前表演，我觉得那一定很有趣。那你呢？

text: that would be really fun um yeah what about you well kind of similar I think actually when I was a child,
zh: 其实跟你差不多，我小时候觉得当职业运动员会很棒，无论是足球运动员还是板球运动员。

text: I thought that being a professional sportsman would be fantastic, either a footballer or a cricketer.
zh: 我小时候觉得当职业运动员会很棒，无论是足球运动员还是板球运动员。

text: What went wrong?
zh: 后来怎么就没实现呢？

text: I'm not good enough.
zh: 我不够优秀。

text: I learned that lesson.
zh: 我明白了这一点。

text: But also I wanted, when I got a little bit older, sort of teenage, and started playing guitar, I thought, yeah, maybe a rock star would be the thing for me.
zh: 但后来，等我大一点，十几岁的时候，开始弹吉他，我又想，也许当摇滚明星更适合我。

text: So, Neil, obviously you are not a rock star, but how or when did you decide to become an English teacher instead?
zh: Neil，显然你现在不是摇滚明星，那你是怎么或什么时候决定改行当英语老师的呢？

text: Well, when I finished university, I wanted to travel more than anything else, and I wanted to live in foreign countries, not just go on holiday.
zh: 嗯，大学毕业后，我最想做的就是去旅行，我想住在国外，而不只是去度假。

text: And I thought a good way to do that would be to become an English teacher.
zh: 我觉得当英语老师是实现这个愿望的好办法。

text: Yeah, I have a similar story.
zh: 是啊，我的经历也差不多。

text: It was the same thing for me.
zh: 我也是出于同样的原因。

text: I just wanted to live abroad.
zh: 我就是想在国外生活。

text: George, what is important to you about your job now?
zh: Georgie，你现在的工作对你来说，什么最重要？

text: Well, many of us spend a lot of our lives working.
zh: 嗯，我们很多人一生中大部分时间都在工作。

text: So for me, it's really important to enjoy the day.
zh: 所以对我来说，享受每一天真的很重要。

text: We work nine to five.
zh: 我们朝九晚五地工作。

text: It's a lot of hours in the day.
zh: 一天中要花很多时间在工作上。

text: It's really important to me to have a nice team that you can have fun with.
zh: 有一个能一起开心相处的好团队对我来说非常重要。

text: It's also really important for me to feel like
zh: 对我来说，感觉到自己在贡献一些好的东西，或者做好这份工作，也很重要。

text: I'm giving something good or doing a good job what about you yeah i think it's important
zh: 那你呢？我觉得重要的是

text: to feel that you're doing something useful so hopefully our conversations like this are useful for people because they can learn something and i like that yeah
zh: 觉得自己在做一些有用的事情，所以希望我们这样的对话对大家有用，因为他们能从中学到东西，我很喜欢这一点。

text: me too so neil if you didn't have to worry about money or anything else what would your dream job be i think i know the answer already Yeah,
zh: 我也是。那Neil，如果你不用担心钱或其他任何事情，你的梦想工作会是什么？我想我已经知道答案了。

text: well, you said earlier that I didn't become a rock star, but there is still a future.
zh: 是的，你刚才说我没成为摇滚明星，但未来还有可能。

text: And, you know, if I didn't have to work, I could just follow my dream.
zh: 而且，你知道的，如果我不用为生计工作，我就可以去追寻我的梦想。

text: How about you?
zh: 那你呢？

text: I think if I didn't do this job, I would like to be a travel photographer or someone that makes documentaries.
zh: 我觉得如果不做现在这份工作，我想成为一名旅行摄影师，或者做纪录片的人。

text: documentaries.
zh: 纪录片。

text: I really love those nature documentaries and it would be very fun to be involved in those.
zh: 我真的很喜欢那些自然类纪录片，能参与其中一定很有趣。

text: Yes, that sounds like it would be amazing.
zh: 是啊，那听起来一定很棒。

text: OK, let's recap the language we heard during the conversation.
zh: 好了，让我们回顾一下对话中出现的语言点。

text: We can describe something like a job as important to us.
zh: 我们可以说某件事，比如一份工作，对我们来说很重要。

text: For example, I said that a nice team at work is important to me.
zh: 比如，我说过工作中有一个不错的团队对我很重要。

text: We talked about our dream jobs when we were children, using the structure when I was younger I wanted to be.
zh: 我们用“when I was younger I wanted to be”这个结构，谈了我们小时候梦想的职业。

text: So, for example, when I was younger I wanted to be a footballer.
zh: 比如，我们可以说，当我小的时候，我想当一名足球运动员。

text: And we talked about our dream jobs now using conditionals.
zh: 我们还用条件句谈了我们现在梦想的工作。

text: So, for example, if I could do any job, I would be a travel photographer.
zh: 比如，如果我可以做任何工作，我会去当一名旅行摄影师。

text: And when we're talking about jobs, we can do them or we can be them.
zh: 谈到职业时，我们可以说“do”这份工作，也可以说“be”这个职业。

text: For example, For example, I teach English or I am an English teacher.
zh: 比如，我教英语，或者说我是一名英语老师。

text: And that's it for this episode of Real Easy English.
zh: 好了，这一期《Real Easy English》就到这里。

text: If you like our programmes, why not sign up to our email newsletter?
zh: 如果你喜欢我们的节目，不妨订阅我们的电子邮件通讯。

text: You can get suggestions for other English lessons you might enjoy.
zh: 你可以获得其他你可能感兴趣的英语课程推荐。

text: There's a link in the notes for this programme.
zh: 节目介绍里有相关链接。

text: Join us again!
zh: 我们下次再见！

text: Bye!
zh: 拜拜！
